summary: Accept text and URL share intents from any Android/iOS app, route into the existing reading engine. Reuses v6 Instaparser/HtmlTextExtractor pipeline. Adds 'Recently Shared' library section.

design_principles.title: One Tap from Anywhere
design_principles.summary: Happy-path share is one tap. Confirmation only on ambiguity, untrusted domains, or errors.

design_principles.title: Reuse the v6 Extraction Pipeline
design_principles.summary: URL shares reuse InstaparserService and HtmlTextExtractor. No new fetch or parser.

design_principles.title: Cold-Start Tolerant
design_principles.summary: Share intent works in cold-start, suspended, and foreground states. All paths converge on ShareIntentRouter.handle().

design_principles.title: No Silent Network Calls
design_principles.summary: URL fetch only after user confirmation or trusted-domain auto-confirm. Text never touches network.

design_principles.title: Fail Visibly, Recover Gracefully
design_principles.summary: Failed shares surface clear errors with retry/fallback options. Never silent drop.

design_principles.title: Text Shares Are Ephemeral, Like Clipboard
design_principles.summary: Text → ClipboardDocument (Rule 28). URLs → SharedUrlCache, capped FIFO library section.

new_rules.summary: Share intents drain BEFORE runApp(). Dispatch via addPostFrameCallback after navigator mounts.
Cold-start and warm-start payloads must never both fire. Native bridge enforces dedup.
Untrusted-domain URLs ALWAYS go through SharePreviewSheet. Auto-confirm only for AppConfig.trustedShareDomains.
Share payload contents NEVER appear in logs. Metadata only.
Shared text is ephemeral; shared URLs persist in capped FIFO SharedUrlCache.
URL fetching reuses v6 InstaparserService and HtmlTextExtractor unchanged.
Share intent during active reading shows snackbar, not a takeover.

blockers.summary: iOS Share Extension requires Apple Developer Program membership and device testing for distribution validation.
Decide between receive_sharing_intent package and hand-rolled platform channel before TASK-403 begins.
Lock wildcard trusted-domain semantics: *.X matches X plus all subdomains.
Cold-start payload provider initialization order in main() — Riverpod and bindings before drain, runApp after.
iOS App Group ID consistency across host and extension — silent failure if mismatched.
Snackbar vs v7 AssistantSheet visual stacking and dismiss interaction order.
Confirm crypto package availability (transitive or explicit dependency).
Web/desktop graceful degradation — all v8 UI must hide or no-op.

sprints.name: Foundation — Models, Config, Native Bridge prep

tasks.title: Add v8 dependencies to pubspec.yaml
tasks.action: Decide between receive_sharing_intent package and hand-rolled platform channel. If package: add to dependencies. Confirm crypto availability. Run flutter pub get.
acceptance_criteria: Decision documented in TASK comment: package vs hand-rolled
If package: pinned version in pubspec.yaml
crypto package usable from Dart (test with import + simple SHA-256 call)

tasks.title: Create SharedPayload model + SharedPayloadKind enum
tasks.action: Implement SharedPayload (text, url, subject, sourceAppId, receivedAt, kind) and SharedPayloadKind enum (text, url, mixed, empty). Implement fromNative(Map), toJson(), hasText, hasUrl, kind getter, displayTitle getter.
acceptance_criteria: All fields declared with correct nullability
kind returns text/url/mixed/empty for all permutations
hasUrl requires Uri.tryParse(url) != null and url.startsWith('http')
displayTitle falls back: subject -> url -> text[:40] -> '(empty)'
Unit tests cover all kind permutations

tasks.title: Create SharedUrlEntry model + SharedUrlCache service
tasks.action: Implement SharedUrlEntry (url, urlHash, title, domain, sharedAt, wordCount, progress) with fromJson/toJson. Implement SharedUrlCache: add, get, list (newest-first), updateProgress, remove, clearAll. Storage: <appSupport>/shared_url_cache/. URL hash: sha256 truncated to 16 hex. FIFO at cap. All file I/O in Isolate.run().
acceptance_criteria: All entry fields with correct types
add evicts oldest when over cap (insert 21 -> 20 with oldest removed)
All file I/O wrapped in Isolate.run() (Rule 11)

tasks.title: AppConfig additions for v8
tasks.action: Add universalShareEnabled (bool, default true), trustedShareDomains (List<String>, seed list), recentlySharedCap (int, default 20). Add copyWith. Add ConfigNotifier methods: setUniversalShareEnabled, addTrustedShareDomain, removeTrustedShareDomain, setRecentlySharedCap (clamp [5, 100]). All _synchronized. JSON backward-compatible.
acceptance_criteria: Three new fields in AppConfig with correct defaults
Seed list of 10 trusted domains exactly per copilot patch
copyWith supports all three new fields
setRecentlySharedCap(3) clamps to 5; setRecentlySharedCap(200) clamps to 100

tasks.title: Implement Android MainActivity share intent handling
tasks.action: Add intent-filter for ACTION_SEND with mime types text/plain and text/*. In MainActivity.kt: onCreate captures EXTRA_TEXT and EXTRA_SUBJECT; onNewIntent for warm-start. MethodChannel app.speedyboy/share_intent with drainInitial method. EventChannel app.speedyboy/share_intent/stream for warm-start.
acceptance_criteria: App appears in system share sheet for text shares
drainInitial returns Map then null on second call
Warm-start onNewIntent pushes to event channel
Cold-start payload NOT also fired via warm stream (Rule 44)
intent.package used for sourceAppId where available
No crash when share has no EXTRA_TEXT

tasks.title: Implement iOS Share Extension target
tasks.action: New Share Extension target. Bundle ID <base>.SpeedyBoyShareExtension. App Group group.app.speedyboy.shared on host and extension. ShareViewController reads inputItems[0].attachments via NSItemProvider, writes JSON to App Group container, opens host via speedyboy://share?id=<uuid>.
acceptance_criteria: Share Extension target builds for simulator and device
App Group entitlement on both targets with same group ID
Extension appears in iOS share sheet for text and URL shares
Payload JSON written to App Group container
Custom URL scheme speedyboy opens host app
No crash when payload has no usable content

tasks.title: Implement iOS host app URL scheme + payload reader
tasks.action: Add CFBundleURLTypes for scheme speedyboy. AppDelegate handles application(_:open:options:), reads shared_payload.json from App Group, pushes to MethodChannel app.speedyboy/share_intent. Cold-start: didFinishLaunchingWithOptions checks launchOptions[.url] and stashes payload for drainInitial.
acceptance_criteria: Cold-start: kill app -> share text from Safari -> drainInitial returns payload
Warm-start: share from Safari -> payload arrives via event channel within 500ms
Payload file deleted after successful read (no replay on next launch)
Cold-start payload NOT also fired via warm stream

tasks.title: Verify App Group ID consistency + end-to-end iOS share
tasks.action: Audit all iOS files for App Group ID consistency. Add build-time assertion or README check. End-to-end: kill app -> share from Notes -> verify payload arrives in Dart with correct text and source app ID.
acceptance_criteria: App Group ID identical across host entitlements, extension entitlements, ShareViewController, AppDelegate
End-to-end manual test passes (logged in TASK comment)
No App Group access errors in console

tasks.title: Create ShareIntentService (Dart facade)
tasks.action: Wrap platform channel. drainInitialPayload() invokes drainInitial method. incomingPayloads wraps EventChannel. dispose() cancels subscription. Web/desktop: all methods no-op.
acceptance_criteria: drainInitialPayload returns null on normal launch
drainInitialPayload returns SharedPayload on share-launched cold-start
No payload contents logged anywhere (Rule 46) - only metadata

tasks.title: Wire ShareIntentService into main()
tasks.action: main(): WidgetsFlutterBinding.ensureInitialized -> create ProviderContainer -> await ShareIntentService.drainInitialPayload() -> store in initialSharedPayloadProvider -> runApp(). Subscribe to incomingPayloads from root widget after first frame.
acceptance_criteria: Warm-start subscription set up in addPostFrameCallback
Normal launch: provider is null, no errors

tasks.title: Create ShareIntentRouter
tasks.action: Implement decision table. handle(payload, context). Active-reading detection -> snackbar. Text -> /read-clipboard. Trusted URL -> /share-receive 1.5s banner -> fetch -> /read-shared-url. Untrusted URL -> /share-preview. Mixed -> /share-preview. Empty/short -> /share-preview with error. URL fetch via v6 InstaparserService.
acceptance_criteria: Decision table fully covered: text, trusted URL, untrusted URL, mixed, empty, short text
Active reading detection: snackbar with 3 actions
Unit tests for every decision-table row

tasks.title: Create ShareReceiveScreen
tasks.action: Stateless screen with logo, 'Loading shared content...' caption, neumorphic progress ring. shellBase background. 5s timeout -> error sheet.
acceptance_criteria: Uses correct design tokens (shellBase, shellTextSecondary, shellAccent)
Accessible: progress ring has semantic label 'Loading shared content'

tasks.title: Create SharePreviewSheet
tasks.action: Modal bottom sheet with three layouts: mixed (URL + text + 2 read buttons), untrusted URL (URL + Read + Always trust), error (icon + message + Try again / Read as plain text). Source app ID when known. Swipe-down dismiss at sharePreviewDismissVelocity. Always trust adds domain and continues fetch. Read as plain text packages URL as ClipboardDocument.
acceptance_criteria: Source app ID shown when available, hidden when not
Always trust adds domain and continues fetch
Read as plain text creates ClipboardDocument with URL string
Accessible: each button has semantic label

tasks.title: Implement active-reading snackbar handling
tasks.action: Custom neumorphic snackbar (NOT Material SnackBar) with [Read now][Save for later][Dismiss]. Save for later adds URL to SharedUrlCache without fetching; text is no-op. Auto-dismiss at shareSnackbarDurationMs (6s). If AssistantSheet open, close it first.
acceptance_criteria: Snackbar appears on top of reading screen, does not interrupt RSVP timer
Custom neumorphic snackbar (no Material widget) per Rule 15
If AssistantSheet open: close it before showing snackbar
No payload contents in visible UI text beyond preview (use displayTitle)

tasks.title: Add /share-receive, /share-preview, /read-shared-url routes
tasks.action: Add three GoRoute entries per copilot patch. /share-receive -> ShareReceiveScreen. /share-preview -> SharePreviewSheet as modal page. /read-shared-url?hash=<hash> -> ParallaxReadingScreen with sharedUrlHash and wallFoldTransitionPage.

tasks.title: Extend ParallaxReadingScreen for shared URL source
tasks.action: Add sharedUrlHash parameter. Add _isSharedUrl getter mirroring _isInstapaper/_isClipboard. Init: SharedUrlCache.get(hash) -> if cachedText, tokenize -> if not, fetch via v6 InstaparserService -> cache. Seek to entry.progress * wordCount. On pause: SharedUrlCache.updateProgress.
acceptance_criteria: sharedUrlHash parameter added with null default
Cached entries open immediately without network
Uncached entries fetch via v6 InstaparserService (Rule 48)
Progress saved on pause (local only, no remote sync)
If fetch fails: navigate back to /share-preview with error

tasks.title: Create RecentlySharedSection library widget
tasks.action: Collapsible section using v6 LibrarySection shell. Watches recentlySharedProvider. Renders v6 ArticleCard per entry. Long-press -> [Open][Remove from history][Clear all shared]. Hidden when empty. Sits between Instapaper and Local Files sections.
acceptance_criteria: Section shows correct count of entries (<= cap)
Sits between Instapaper and Local Files sections

tasks.title: Create Riverpod providers
tasks.action: Define: initialSharedPayloadProvider (Provider<SharedPayload?>), shareIntentServiceProvider (Provider<ShareIntentService>), shareIntentRouterProvider (Provider<ShareIntentRouter>), recentlySharedProvider (FutureProvider<List<SharedUrlEntry>>), recentlySharedNotifierProvider for mutations.
acceptance_criteria: All providers declared with correct types
No global state - all access through providers

tasks.title: Settings Screen — Sharing Section
tasks.action: Add Sharing section: toggle for universalShareEnabled, editable trusted-domain list (add/remove), dropdown for recentlySharedCap ([5, 10, 20, 50, 100]), Clear shared history button.
acceptance_criteria: Domain list shows current trusted domains; add/remove updates AppConfig
Add domain validates input is valid host (no protocol, no path)
Cap change shrinks cache if new cap < current count (FIFO eviction)

tasks.title: Disable share intent when toggle is off
tasks.action: At top of handle(), check AppConfig.universalShareEnabled. If false: silently drop payload (metadata-only logs). Native intent filter remains; cold-start with toggle off -> navigate to library instead of share destination.
acceptance_criteria: Disable toggle -> share intent triggers no UI navigation
Cold-start with toggle off -> app launches to library

tasks.title: Web/desktop graceful degradation audit
tasks.action: Verify on Linux desktop and Web: app launches without errors. Settings -> Sharing section HIDDEN entirely. RecentlySharedSection hidden. No share-related code paths execute. Run flutter analyze, flutter build web, flutter build <desktop>.
acceptance_criteria: Web build has no Sharing section in Settings
Web build has no RecentlySharedSection in library
No console errors on web/desktop launch

tasks.title: Integration test suite
tasks.action: Implement integration tests for the 14 scenarios from spec's Integration Test Scenarios table. Mock ShareIntentService (override shareIntentServiceProvider). Mock InstaparserService for URL fetches. Verify routing decisions match decision table.
acceptance_criteria: Test for trusted-domain auto-confirm vs untrusted preview (Rule 45)
Test for log scrubbing - no payload text in captured logs (Rule 46)

tasks.title: Final cross-cutting verification
tasks.action: Run verification command suite. Manual smoke test on Android emulator: cold-start text share, warm-start URL share, trusted vs untrusted, recently shared section, settings toggle. iOS smoke test on simulator (extension may need device).
acceptance_criteria: No raw print() calls in v8 service files
Manual smoke test passes on Android emulator (logged in TASK comment)
iOS smoke test passes on simulator OR documented as device-required

out_of_scope.reason: OCR engine selection is its own design exercise
Overlaps with v3 PDF import; defer to v9 design pass
Edge case; v8 takes first valid URL with notice

out_of_scope.feature: Android quick-tile / shortcut for read clipboard
